dashboard.title: My Models
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your AR assets.
dashboard.noModelsDesc: Start by uploading your first furniture product. We'll generate the AR assets automatically.

modelCard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete

qrModal.title: Share AR Experience
Title
qrModal.subtitle: Subtitle
qrModal.posterDescription: Professional marketing poster with QR code - perfect for printing and displaying on furniture
qrModal.buttonLabelPlaceholder: e.g., View in AR, See in 3D, Try in Your Space
qrModal.embedDescription: Copy this HTML code to embed an AR button on your website
qrModal.step2: Paste it into your website's HTML
qrModal.step3: The button will link directly to the AR viewer
qrModal.step4: Works on all devices - mobile users get full AR experience

create.title: Create New Model
create.subtitle: Upload a photo and specify dimensions to generate your AR asset.
create.supports: Supports JPG, PNG. High contrast images work best.
create.dimensionsDesc: Enter the exact real-world dimensions of the object. The AI will scale the generated model to match these bounds.

shopify.title: Shopify Products
shopify.subtitle: — Select a product to generate a 3D model from its image.
shopify.notConnectedDesc: Connect your Shopify store to browse products and push 3D models directly to your product pages.
shopify.connectedDesc: You can now browse products and push 3D models.
shopify.noResults: No products found matching your search.
shopify.noProducts: No products in your store yet.
shopify.moreProducts: Showing first 24 products. Use search to find specific products.
shopify.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Shopify store?
shopify.bulkDimensionsDesc: Enter default dimensions for all selected products. You can adjust individual products below.
shopify.bulkLimitExceeded: You can only generate {remaining} more models this month. You selected {selected} products.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences.
settings.supportNote: Need to update your email or password? Please contact support at spacecheck@sebastiankotarski.com

credits.title: Credits
credits.creditsDesc: Each credit unlocks one 3D model for download & sharing
credits.unlockHint: Use 1 credit to unlock a model for sharing AR links, downloading files, and QR codes.
credits.noCreditsDesc: Purchase credits to unlock and download models.
credits.howItWorks: Generate 3D models for free from any product photo. Preview the result, then use 1 credit to unlock downloading, sharing AR links, and QR codes.
credits.creditsPurchasedDesc: Your credits have been added to your account. You can now unlock models for download and sharing.
credits.modelUnlockedDesc: Your model is now unlocked! You can share it, download files, and get QR codes.
credits.paymentSuccess: Your payment has been processed successfully.
